query: 局部高浓度电解液（LHCE）的稀释剂选择策略与溶剂化结构-性能构效关系调研要点：系统梳理2019-2024年间Nature Energy、Joule、Angew等期刊关于LHCE在锂金属电池（LMB）和硅碳负极中的应用进展对比分析氢氟醚（HFE）、全氟化碳、羟基醚等不同稀释剂对内层溶剂化鞘层（AGGREGATES）结构的影响机制调研稀释剂-溶剂-锂盐三元体系的相图与离子传输数（t⁺）的关联规律，总结实现高离子电导率（>5 mS/cm）与高氧化稳定性（>5 V）平衡的设计准则识别当前LHCE在宽温域（-40℃~60℃）应用中的关键瓶颈（如低温下稀释剂共嵌入、高温挥发等）

result.answer:

Title: Advanced Energy Materials
Content: electrolyte (1 M NaClO4 in EC/PC).

The electrochemical performance suggested that the ILs
are capable of stabilizing the cell.

The tethered ILs are favorable for forming a robust and
stable solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) film on the sodium anode surface, which prevents the
occurrence of side reactions with the electrolyte.117 Meanwhile, the SiO2 particles can anchor
- anions, which serve as supporting electrolyte, thus reducing the electric field through
the tethered anion effect.

citations.quoted_text:

All calculations were performed using density functional theory (DFT) with a plane wave
basis set, as implemented in the Vienna Ab initio Simulation Package (VASP).7 Core-valence
electron interactions were treated using the projector augmented wave (PAW)11,12 method, and the
semi-local generalized gradient approximation (GGA) of Perdew, Burke, and Ernzerhof (PBE)13 was
used for the exchange-correlation energy.

The investigation of liquid electrolyte solvents for RT-Na/S starts with ethers, including

Studies suggest that the ether-based electrolytes are
likely to contribute to low capacity.41,61, 72 Although the theoretical end product Na2S could be
detected, the capacity is only about 350-550 mA h g-1, indicating that the sodiation reaction is
incomplete, with production of an overall composition of Na2Sx (3 ≤ x ≤ 5).
